title: Fix routes prefix snprintf, CBOR partial write prevention in encode_routes_cbor and related encoders
description: Strengthen snprintf check for prefix_buf in lichen_coap_encode_routes_cbor (already partial check exists), ensure prefix_buf size is sufficient for IPv6+/len (update if needed), propagate errors strictly to avoid any partial CBOR output in status/neighbors/routes. Align with CCP-17 capacity rules.
